info.name: API
info.description:
Collection for validating the current Aptitude Skills API.

  - Sanity: covers authenticated publish, lifecycle updates, exact fetch, discovery, and resolution
  - Negative: covers authenticated validation, duplicate, exact-fetch errors, and resolution errors

Note: `/readyz` exposes a 503 branch only when the runtime is unhealthy, so the collection
asserts the healthy `200 ready` path by default.

All business endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. The default token variables
match the local development `AUTH_TOKENS_JSON` example from the README.

item.name: Sanity
item.description:
Happy-path requests for the Aptitude Skills API.

Expected run order:
  1. Healthz
  2. Readyz
  3. Publish Dependency Skill
  4. Publish Extension Skill
  5. Publish Overlap Skill
  6. Publish Skill v1
  7. Publish Skill v2
  8. Update Skill Version Status
  9. Fetch Published Skill Metadata
  10. Fetch Published Skill Content
  11. Discover Published Skill Candidates
  12. Resolve Published Skill Dependencies

item.name: Negative
item.description:
Deterministic negative coverage for the Aptitude Skills API.

These requests include their own setup for the duplicate-publish path so the
folder can still be run independently.
